extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity. I counted only the “Against” rows: criminal proceedings are Nil for the Company, Directors, Promoters, Group Company and Subsidiary; statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil throughout; and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiary are Nil, while the tax matters shown against Directors and Promoters are excluded from the company/subsidiary tax count. The aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiary is explicitly Nil in the table, so the quantified aggregate is ₹0 million, converted to ₹0.0 crore; the separately disclosed receivable and costs are proceedings by the Company and are excluded. The contingent-liabilities table is as at June 30, 2022 and uses Rs. in lakhs, but it provides no stated Total row for contingent liabilities, so no total is extracted rather than summing line items. The litigation table uses Rs. in million and the contingent-liabilities table uses Rs. in lakhs, therefore the source unit is mixed; any applicable conversion would be million ÷ 10 or lakh ÷ 100 for crore.
